---
name: Horizon Data Analytics Request
about: Submit a data, tracking, or analytics request
title: ''
labels: 'Horizon, needs-refinement'
assignees: ''

---

## What problem(s) are you trying to solve?


## What question(s) do you need answered?


## Tool
_What tool does this apply to?_

## Page / Feature / Area
_Where is this happening?_

## Tagging Status
_Select ONE only._
- [ ] Needs tagging (no tracking currently exists)
- [ ] Tagged but NOT tracking correctly
- [ ] Tagged and tracking correctly

## Dashboard / Tracking Location
_If tagged or tracked, include the dashboard or tool where this exists, e.g. Datadog dashboard link, GA4 report, Power BI link._

## Expected vs Actual Behavior
_What should be happening vs what you are seeing (if applicable)._

## Monitoring Date Range
_What timeframe should be analyzed or monitored? e.g. Last 7 days, 03/01–03/15, ongoing._

## Urgency
_When is this needed?_
- [ ] ASAP (blocking)
- [ ] This week
- [ ] This month
- [ ] No specific deadline

## Request Type
- [ ] One-time analysis
- [ ] Ongoing monitoring
- [ ] Dashboard / report creation

## Existing Data / Sources
_Any known dashboards, reports, or tools already used?_

## Stakeholder / Request Owner
_Who should be contacted for questions?_

## Additional Context
_Add links, screenshots, or anything else helpful._
